name: 2'x3' Comfort Mat Bohome Accent Rug Yellow - Threshold™
description:
This Comfort Mat Bohome Accent Rug Threshold™ makes a chic addition to any indoor space. This rectangular accent rug showcases floral bohome print on a yellow backdrop for a charming look that blends well with any decor aesthetic. Featuring a woven polyester construction for soft comfort underfoot, the accent rug also has a low-pile construction, making it perfect for high-traffic areas like your living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
